passage.title: A Day with Letter Writing
passage.text: Dear friend, I hope you are well. I want to tell you about my new job. Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint. The condition of the road is very bad. Please solve this problem. Dear mother, I am fine here. I miss you a lot. Your loving son. Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter. This problem is affecting the whole city.
passage.hindiTranslation: प्रिय मित्र, मुझे आशा है तुम ठीक होगे। मैं तुम्हें अपनी नई नौकरी के बारे में बताना चाहता हूँ। आदरणीय महोदय, मैं आपको यह पत्र शिकायत के लिए लिख रहा हूँ। सड़क की हालत बहुत खराब है। कृपया इस समस्या का समाधान करें। प्रिय माँ, मैं यहाँ ठीक हूँ। मुझे तुम्हारी बहुत याद आती है। आपका स्नेही पुत्र। आदरणीय संपादक महोदय, मैं यह पत्र प्रकाशित करने का अनुरोध करता हूँ। यह समस्या पूरे शहर को प्रभावित कर रही है।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "Dear friend, I hope..."?
options: Your loving son.
Please replace it as soon as possible.
I want to tell you about my new job.
Dear friend, I hope you are well.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: Dear friend, I hope you are well.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "Dear friend, I hope you are well."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I want to tell..."?
options: Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter.

Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint.

comprehensionQuestions.answer: I want to tell you about my new job.

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "Respected Sir, I am..."?
